status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Scaffold Shopify Remix app + green init.sh harness
features.user_visible_behavior: From a clean checkout, `bash init.sh` installs deps and runs typecheck + lint + test + build, ending in HARNESS GREEN.
verification: Observe it ends with HARNESS GREEN (typecheck, lint, test, build all pass).
evidence: bash init.sh -> HARNESS GREEN (2026-06-25). 1/6 Node v22.16.0 OK. 2/6 npm install: up to date, 1141 packages. 3/6 prisma generate: Generated Prisma Client v6.19.3. 4/6 typecheck (tsc --noEmit): 0 errors. 5/6 lint: clean (only @remix-run/eslint-config deprecation warning); vitest run --passWithNoTests: No test files found, exit 0. 6/6 build (remix vite:build): 1428 modules transformed, built in 10.91s + SSR built in 273ms.
Fixed dependency drift: pinned @shopify/shopify-api to 13.1.0 via overrides/resolutions (template ^ ranges pulled two copies 12.3.0 + 13.1.0, breaking PrismaSessionStorage Session types).
features.notes: Built from the official Shopify Remix template (cloned from github.com/Shopify/shopify-app-template-remix, since `create-app` requires interactive Partner-org selection). Store linking is a manual demo step. Added scripts: typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run --passWithNoTests). Added vitest devDependency.

features.title: Pure pricing rules + Vitest tests (TDD)
features.user_visible_behavior: Pricing math (percentage, round-to-.99, set-compare-at, money parse/format) is implemented as pure functions and covered by passing unit tests.
verification: Run `npm run test` — Vitest suite for app/lib/pricing.ts is green.
Run `npm run typecheck` — no type errors.
features.notes: app/lib/pricing.ts must have zero Shopify/Remix/Polaris imports.

features.title: Products loader (Admin GraphQL read)
features.user_visible_behavior: The app route loads products (title + first-variant price + compareAtPrice) from the store via the Admin GraphQL `products` query.
verification: Run `npm run typecheck && npm run build` — compiles with the new loader.
If a dev store is connected: `npm run dev` lists product titles + prices (screenshot).

features.title: Polaris UI: selection, rule form, live preview
features.user_visible_behavior: Merchant selects products, sets a percentage + toggles, and sees a live before/after price preview before applying.
verification: Run `npm run typecheck && npm run build`.
If a dev store is connected: selecting rows and changing the rule updates the preview live (screenshot).

features.title: Apply action (productVariantsBulkUpdate write)
features.user_visible_behavior: Clicking Apply writes new prices (and optional compare-at) to the selected products; a success banner reports updated/skipped counts.
verification: Run `npm run typecheck && npm run build`.
Live demo on a dev store: select products → -20% → Apply → confirm new price + strikethrough compare-at in Shopify admin (before/after screenshots).
features.notes: Requires the dev store + write_products scope. This is the real end-to-end demo evidence.

features.title: Polish + capture demo evidence
features.user_visible_behavior: Empty-state + submitting state handled; demo screenshots/log captured under docs/demo/.

features.title: Docs, handoff, and presentation file
features.user_visible_behavior: docs/PRESENTATION.md answers the six course questions; README + handoff updated; clean state.
verification: docs/PRESENTATION.md exists and answers all six questions.
Run `bash init.sh && git status --short` — green, no stray/.env files.
